note: Re-measured 2026-05-31 conc=1 (max-concurrency 1) on v0.5.12 + patch-041 GEMV, --disable-cuda-graph (preset default). SUPERSEDES the 2026-04-24 pre-v0.5.12 curve (24.1 short-ctx, TPOT 41.5 ms). The two DeltaNet-27B AWQ hybrids (this + Qwen3.5-27B) are measured-identical; 16K/65K here are from the Qwen3.5-27B twin's clean JSONL sweep (13.7 / 11.8). OPEN REGRESSION: the April-24 stack decoded these at 24.1 (~1.7x faster); enabling cuda-graph on v0.5.12 does NOT recover it (verified 'Decode batch ... cuda graph: True' still ~13 tok/s), so the gap is a slower AWQ Linear kernel/dispatch in v0.5.12, not graph capture. See README Open work #2.
